news.headline: Newmark sells Skims HQ in Hollywood for $105 million. Leading real estate advisor.2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, in Los Angeles, Newmark Group, Inc. (Nasdaq: NMRK), a prominent commercial real estate advisor catering to major institutional investors, global corporations, and property owners, disclosed that the company...

news.headline: Alliant Energy Corp (NASDAQ: LNT) declares $0.5075 quarterly dividend, payable on May 15, 2025 to shareholders of record on April 30, 2025. 318 consecutive quarters of dividend payment since 1946.
news.summary: The Board of Directors of Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.5075 per share, with a payment date of May 15, 2025, for shareholders of record as of April 30, 2025. This marks the 318th consecutive quarter of dividends on common stock since 1946. Alliant Energy Corporation is a member of the S&P 500 Dividend Aristocrats Index. Alliant Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: LNT) offers regulated energy services.

news.headline: EC Pres. von der Leyen to make statement on US tariffs Thursday morning.
Parse Biosciences partners with SCRUM Inc. to expand in Japan’s research community.
news.summary: Parse Biosciences has recently revealed a new partnership with SCRUM Inc., a company based in Tokyo, aimed at broadening its influence within Japan’s research sector. This strategic collaboration is anticipated to enhance Parse Biosciences' reach in Japan and further solidify their position in the market.

news.headline: AES Corporation will host a conference call on May 2, 2025 at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to review its first quarter financial results.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled by The AES Corporation (NYSE: AES) in Arlington, Virginia, on May 2, 2025, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time to discuss the financial results for the first quarter of 2025. The call will feature prepared statements and a Q&A session.

news.headline: Jewelers Mutual® Group acquires Q Report, expanding into Australia and benefiting global jewelry market.
news.summary: The recent acquisition has provided Jewelers Mutual® Group with a significant competitive edge, leading to an expansion of its presence in Australia. This move is expected to result in operational synergies that will prove advantageous for the worldwide jewelry market. The acquisition was finalized on April 2, 2025, in NEENAH, Wisconsin, marking a milestone for the company's growth strategy. This development is anticipated to have a substantial impact on the company's global operations and market position.

news.headline: Cheesecake Factory on Fortune's '100 Best Companies to Work For' list for 12th time, ranking 23rd.
news.summary: In Calabasas Hills, California, The Cheesecake Factory Incorporated (NASDAQ: CAKE) has once again been acknowledged as one of the Fortune 100 Best Companies to Work For®, marking their twelfth consecutive year of achievement. Fortune magazine and Great Place to Work® announced the recognition, with The Cheesecake Factory® securing the 23rd position on the prestigious list. This accolade honors companies that foster a culture of generosity, support, and high performance throughout the entire organization. The rankings for this esteemed list are primarily based on confidential feedback from employees.

news.headline: reAlpha Tech Corp. reports financial results for year ended December 31, 2024 in Dublin, Ohio, as AI tech company.
news.summary: In Dublin, Ohio, on April 2, 2025, reAlpha Tech Corp. (Nasdaq: AIRE), a real estate technology firm focused on AI technologies, released its business update and financial results for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

news.headline: Senior White House Official: Trump will respond to retaliation by other countries to ensure that the emergency order is not undermined.
Senior White House Official: Exemption for USMCA-compliant goods from Mexico and Canada will continue.
Apartments.com's report shows 1.1% YOY rent growth in Q1 2025, with national rent per unit at $1,754.
news.summary: Apartments.com, part of CoStar Group, released a comprehensive report on multifamily rent trends for Q1 2025. In March 2025, national year-over-year asking rent growth for apartments remained steady at 1.1%, consistent with the end of December 2024. Following a significant slowdown in 2021 and 2022, rent growth has maintained just above 1% since mid-2023. The national rent per unit at the end of the quarter was $1,754, showing a slight increase from the previous quarter.

news.headline: Senior White House Official: There is about 60 or so countries on the worst offender list.
Senior White House Official: Trump plans other sectoral tariffs for semiconductors, pharmaceuticals and potentially critical minerals. those also won't be covered by the new regime.
Senior White House Official: Post World War II institutions are no longer fit for our times and our economic situation.
Senior White House Official: USMCA-compliant goods will continue to receive exemption from fentanyl-related tariffs.
Senior White House Official: Will charge countries half the calculated reciprocal tariff rate that factors in tariffs, non-tariff barriers.
Senior White House Official: Will be imposing a 10% baseline tariff on all countries and higher reciprocal tariffs on a list of worst offenders.
Senior White House Official: Reciprocal tariffs will go into effect on April 9th at 12:01 AM.
Senior White House Official: Likely to take a long time for non-tariff barriers to be removed by other countries.
Senior White House Official: Tariffs based on the international emergency economic powers act.
Senior White House Official: Tariffs on Canada and Mexico over fentanyl and migration will continue while those conditions persist.
Senior White House Official: Trump to declare national emergency due to national security and economic security concerns over US trade deficits.
Senior White House Official: Products covered by Section 232 tariffs, including autos, steel, aluminum, copper and lumber, will not be included.
US Aide: Trump to sign order that closes de minimus loophole.
Senior White House Official: Baseline tariff rate will go into effect on April 5th at 12:01 AM.
Senior White House Official: Tariff baseline floor for all countries aimed at avoiding circumvention.
Senior White House Official: Executive order will list reciprocal tariffs by country.
Bitcoin's value falls after Trump advances global 'reciprocal' tariffs, creating uncertainty in the market.
Trump: We are being given good cooperation by Ukraine and Russia.
Trump: We will make cars, chips, ships, planes, and minerals in the US.
Trump: Pharmaceutical companies will come roaring back.
Trump announces reciprocal tariffs on trade partners, setting half the tariff rate they impose on US goods. April 2, 2025 marked as historic day.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, President Donald Trump introduced a new trade strategy to address America's trade imbalances, dubbing it as “our Declaration of Economic Independence.” Trump emphasized the significance of this date, stating it would mark the resurgence of American industry and the reclaiming of the nation's destiny. The focal point of his plan is the implementation of a reciprocal tariff scheme for imports from trade partners. These tariffs will be set at half the rate imposed on U.S. goods by the respective countries. Trump hailed the actions taken on April 2 as a pivotal moment in American history, drawing parallels to a declaration.

news.headline: Fritz & Co. advises Willowglen Systems in securing strategic investment, April 2, 2025.
news.summary: On April 2, 2025, Fritz & Company I, LLC, a top technology investment banking advisory and special situations firm, disclosed that it will serve as the Exclusive Financial Advisor to Willowglen Systems Inc. in a recent deal. Willowglen Systems Inc. is a key player in the industry.

news.headline: Logistic Properties of the Americas (NYSE American: LPA) released full-year 2024 earnings in U.S. dollars per IFRS.
news.summary: Costa Rica-based company Logistic Properties of the Americas (NYSE American: LPA) disclosed its audited consolidated financial results for the year ending December 31, 2024 ("FY24"). The figures are denominated in U.S. dollars and adhere to the International Financial Reporting Standards from the International Accounting Standards Board. The company, included with its subsidiaries, reported its financial performance for FY24 without specifying details.

news.headline: Southland's subsidiary awarded $97M worth of water projects in Southwest; adds to 2025 backlog. Leading infrastructure provider.
news.summary: Headquartered in Grapevine, Texas, Southland Holdings, Inc. revealed that one of its Civil segment subsidiaries, Oscar Renda Contracting, has secured two water resource projects in the Southwest region, valued at around $97 million. These projects are anticipated to contribute to the first quarter 2025 backlog for the company. Southland, traded under NYSE American as SLND and SLND WS, is renowned for delivering specialized infrastructure construction services and boasts a rich history dating back to 1900.

Trump: We need to get permanent tax cuts.
New tariff: 10% on all imports by Trump, reciprocal levies by countries.
Trump Tariffs List continued
HyAxiom announces first multi-megawatt, multi-story fuel cell project in Bridgeport, delivering low-emission power.
news.summary: An initiative in Bridgeport, the Charter Oak Combined Heat and Power (CHP) Project, is striving to offer environmentally friendly power generation with minimal emissions, alongside high efficiency in combined heat and power production. This project is set to produce local energy benefits as well. On April 2, 2025, HyAxiom, Inc., a prominent company in fuel cell and hydrogen solutions worldwide, unveiled this significant initiative. The project's main focus is on delivering low-emission power, attaining high efficiency in CHP, and bringing energy advantages to the local community.

news.headline: Trump reiterates that tax cuts will be passed.
Swiss President Keller-Sutter: The Swiss Federal Council takes note of the US tariff decisions. It will quickly determine the next steps.
Trump: Social security won't be cut.
Legal team investigating potential lawsuit for Libra investors over Milei-backed Solana token launch in Feb. Allegations include fraud and racketeering.
news.summary: The Treanor Law Firm is currently looking into claims of fraud, market manipulation, and racketeering linked to the debut of Libra in February.

news.headline: US to impose 10% tariff on Qatar - Chart.
Trump tariff list contined (again)
American Century Investments discusses investor opportunities in uncertain market conditions dominated by policy issues in its second quarter outlook.
news.summary: American Century Investments has released its second quarter investment outlook, highlighting opportunities in a tumultuous season marked by uncertainties in policy and markets. The report, issued on April 2, 2025 in Kansas City, Missouri, covers a range of pressing issues such as tariffs, spending cuts, and interest rates. The insights provided shed light on current challenges and potential investment avenues amid the evolving economic landscape. This update is part of the company's continuous efforts to guide investors through the complexities of the market.

news.headline: Frontline healthcare providers celebrate proposed healthcare transparency laws at Independent Medical Alliance Annual Conference in Washington. (Characters: 131)
news.summary: The upcoming Independent Medical Alliance (IMA) annual conference in Washington on April 2, 2025, will showcase a series of recent achievements at the federal and state levels. The conference will bring together leading doctors, healthcare providers, and researchers to discuss important victories in the medical field. This event is expected to draw a significant number of participants eager to learn from the success stories and advancements in healthcare policy.

news.headline: Kenon Holdings announces 2024 results, $250 million cash dividend approved in April 2025.
news.summary: Singapore, April 2, 2025 - Kenon Holdings Ltd. disclosed their financial outcomes for 2024 alongside latest developments. Noteworthy figures include a cash dividend sanctioned by the board of directors amounting to around $250 million, equivalent to $4.80 for each share. Kenon, listed on NYSE as KEN and TASE as KEN, presented its Q4 highlights and recent achievements.
